title: Staining and Dehydration of 10 Micron Rat Heart Sections
author: Shaina Robbins
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.webfban

steps.title: Remove slide from -80 °C freezer
steps.instruction: Remove slide from -80 °C freezer. Keep slide covered and allow to come to room temperature for 00:01:00 or until frost on slide dissipates.

steps.title: Submerge slide into cold acetone (kept...
steps.instruction: Submerge slide into cold acetone (kept in -20 °C freezer) for 00:00:15

steps.title: Gently dip slide 10 times into...
steps.instruction: Gently dip slide 10 times into 1x PBS or until OCT appears to be washed off 1X Phosphate Buffered Saline Solution Contributed by users Catalog #BP2438-4

steps.title: Submerge slide into 0
steps.instruction: Submerge slide into 0.1% Cresyl Violet for 00:05:00

steps.title: Gently rinse slide by dipping into...
steps.instruction: Gently rinse slide by dipping into H2O 10 times EMD Millipore™ Ultrapure Water for Molecular Biology Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #09-739-011

steps.title: Gently dip slide 10 times into...
steps.instruction: Gently dip slide 10 times into 1x PBS 1X Phosphate Buffered Saline Solution Contributed by users Catalog #BP2438-4

steps.title: Dip and agitate slide 2 times into 95% EtOH
steps.instruction: Dip and agitate slide 2 times into 95% EtOH

steps.title: Dip and agitate slide 2 times...
steps.instruction: Dip and agitate slide 2 times into 100% EtOH Ethanol 200 Proof Decon Labs Catalog #2716

steps.title: Submerge slide into 100% EtOH for...
steps.instruction: Submerge slide into 100% EtOH for 00:00:15 Ethanol 200 Proof Decon Labs Catalog #2716

steps.title: Gently dip slide 2 times into...
steps.instruction: Gently dip slide 2 times into Xylene Xylenes histological grade Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #534056-4L Flammable liquids (Category 3), H226 Acute toxicity, Inhalation (Category 4), H332 Skin irritation (Category 2), H315 Eye irritation (Category 2A), H319 Carcinogenicity (Category 2), H351

steps.title: Submerge slide into Xylene for 00:00:20...
steps.instruction: Submerge slide into Xylene for 00:00:20 Xylenes histological grade Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #534056-4L Flammable liquids (Category 3), H226 Acute toxicity, Inhalation (Category 4), H332 Skin irritation (Category 2), H315 Eye irritation (Category 2A), H319 Carcinogenicity (Category 2), H351

steps.title: Allow slide to dry under chemical...
steps.instruction: Allow slide to dry under chemical fume hood for 00:05:00 Proceed to LCM/LMD
